text: The ball out of Leonard's hands. Leonard gets away. Pass inside. Blocked by Green. And Draymond Green with his first projection. Fifteen of the thirty-six points for Golden State. Leonard's blocked by Livingston. What a play by Shaolin Livingston. Livingston inside. Slaughted by Ibaka. Blocked out of bounds by Serge Ibaka. Roasted Toronto. With his points to lose, he Ibaka rejects it out of bounds. Fourth block for Serge Ibaka. On the drive, Green can't finish. That was some play by Siakam to block that shot. Lowry against Jordan Bell. Gets it to the paint again. The block by Bell. Rejected. Slaughted away. Blocked by Jordan Bell. Cook to the rim. Blocked by Ibaka. And they can't save it. Goes out of bounds. Bad pass. Stolen by Lowry. Green in pursuit. Lowry up. Blocked by Draymond Green. Wow! What a rejection. Blocked away by Draymond. Here's Cook ahead of the pack. One man to beat. Gets inside. Blocked by Danny Green. Sensational recovery. Drives right. Double pump. Gets it to Ben Lee into the corner. Lowry's jumper blocked and Golden State wins it. We will go to Oakland tomorrow. The Warriors survive.
